Dear Friend, To control the corona virus outbreak, we must start executing basic public health methods of rapid detection of new cases, contact tracing, and isolation to control the spread. Rapid detection requires widespread testing of potential cases. Some U.S. officials seem to be more worried about what impact accurate detection and case counts might have on our financial markets than they are in engaging in an evidence-based response to the threat. Because of that, and a variety of other reasons, we are unprepared to test at scale. It's time for all our elected officials to get behind the full-scale public health effort it's going to take to get the situation under control. Preparedness isn't sexy. It doesn't generate headlines or sound bites. It requires investments for which there is no immediate measurable return. It's also a fundamental responsibility of government. During his time in Congress, Pete Sessions received a 0% rating from the American Public Health Association and voted consistently to weaken our health care system without presenting viable alternatives. This is not the person we want representing us in Congress. name: Charles Booker
subject: HuffPost: “The Candidate Fighting To Save Coal Country From Mitch McConnell”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
People whose jobs are going away need opportunity. But Mitch McConnell doesn’t give a damn, and he ain’t sending help.
#
We woke up to this headline in _HuffPost_. It made me proud.
Kentucky wants a Green New Deal. Coal country _needs_ a Green New Deal.
People whose jobs are going away need opportunity. But Mitch McConnell doesn’t give a damn, and he ain’t sending help.
The pundits and politicians think a Green New Deal can’t win in Kentucky. Well, they’re dead wrong.
It doesn’t matter if you’re a Republican, Democrat, or nonvoter. Kentuckians who helped America ‘keep the lights on’ for decades want to be able to keep _their_ lights on as the jobs fade away. **We must defeat Mitch McConnell.**
[**Can I count on you to give $5 to help us bring more Kentuckians into our campaign and defeat Mitch McConnell? Everywhere we go, folks are responding well. We just need the dollars to reach more people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15858066/167808639/-561295409?refcode=em20200308&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTAxZDM5My02MTYxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpEycXstdE8cAF-2q7LeZips82gEh9YLmXTMOLqa9RI=)
**[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15858067/167808640/-561295409?refcode=em20200308&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTAxZDM5My02MTYxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpEycXstdE8cAF-2q7LeZips82gEh9YLmXTMOLqa9RI=)**
Our movement is on the rise in Kentucky. People may be waking up to this headline today, but they’ve been ready for change for a long time. If we’re going to win in this primary and beat Mitch in November, we’ll need help. We need the money to reach voters with our message of hope and opportunity.
[**Please, make a $5 contribution so we can reach more and more Kentuckians with our powerful Green New Deal agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15858068/167808641/-561295409?refcode=em20200308&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTAxZDM5My02MTYxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kpEycXstdE8cAF-2q7LeZips82gEh9YLmXTMOLqa9RI=)
Thanks for giving us a fighting chance today. We may be an underdog, but I know Kentucky is ready to upset the status quo.
Charles Booker

The pundits and politicians think a Green New Deal can’t win in Kentucky. Well, they’re dead wrong. It doesn’t matter if you’re a Republican, Democrat, or nonvoter. Kentuckians who helped America ‘keep the lights on’ for decades want to be able to keep their lights on as the jobs fade away. We must defeat Mitch McConnell. = = Our movement is on the rise in Kentucky. People may be waking up to this headline today, but they’ve been ready for change for a long time. If we’re going to win in this primary and beat Mitch in November, we’ll need help. body:
Hello, it's Nicole, Greg's wife!

**Today is Greg 's 50th birthday and I wanted to surprise him with one of the best gifts I could think of for him -- a surprise birthday card signed by all of his grassroots supporters! **

So I am teaming up with Greg's campaign team today to organize an e-card for Greg and I would love if you could sign it and wish him an extra special 50th birthday.

Hey Team — When I entered this race, I knew the odds. Challenging an incumbent President, let alone a narcissist whose ego is holding the Republican Party hostage, isn’t easy. [**
**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200308_frs&n=4)
For all of the people who wonder why I’m doing it, the answer is simple: because _the American people deserve to have a candidate who will fight for accountability and the rule of law._[**
**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200308_frs&n=5)
What did we learn on Tuesday? That a significant number of conservatives throughout the nation are looking for an alternative to this disastrous President. In fact, voters rejected President Trump to the tune of:
* 12% in Massachusetts
* 12% in Utah
* 13% in Vermont

Our job isn’t over. As we continue to grow our movement and draw new, concerned voters into the fold, we’ll continue to push our message of fiscal conservatism, self-reliance, and belief in the American electorate to make the right choice.[****](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200308_frs&n=6)
| [CHIP IN NOW →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23MN5-4bGA05v91SDiR0vFTREASeO7OSp5LDs6xjHisEmvjQpliNbQiEjmR5WR4zis&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200308_frs&n=7)

I’m thankful for your support, and I hope that you’ll continue to stand with me as we fight to take back the Republican Party.[**
**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsjAaRUA2EeiBCEs8Q5OxWrrCfceWV4R_cQ8oQ1eGt_SE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200308_frs&n=8)

| | Hi Peter,

Do you have a minute to hear why replacing Senator Cornyn with MJ Hegar in November is so important. But if you already know the reasons and are ready to pitch in to support MJ's campaign, **[you can pitch in here.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489028f/7f51f7bc/4c58875e/4ef18cd8/1127931381/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.1nd__1043__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | **This race is a question of integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence.**
---
**MJ has dedicated her entire life to service.**
* A combat search and rescue pilot in the Air Force, she went head to head with the Taliban in Afghanistan.
* Then, she took on the Pentagon to overturn the Ground Combat Exclusion Rule that barred women from ground combat jobs.
* **Now, she's the only political outsider in Texas' Senate race.** She's a working mom who has actually faced the struggles many Texans do, and she's not accepting a dime from corporate PACs. **[That means she needs you -- will you donate today to send MJ to the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489028f/7f51f7bc/4c58875e/4ef18cd8/1127931381/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.1nd__1043__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**Sen. Cornyn, on the other hand?**
* First, he worked his way up in the political establishment in Texas.
* Then, he spent nearly two decades in Washington selling Texans out to the special interests and his DC bosses -- like when he voted to repeal health care protections _twenty times._
* Now, he's running for reelection with an over $12 million war chest heavily funded by special interests, **with outside groups _already_ boosting him and spending millions on ads.**

**The choice could not be any more clear:** a working mom and combat veteran who has lived her values, or an entrenched establishment politician who takes his marching orders from the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. **[Stand with MJ>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489028f/7f51f7bc/4c58875e/4ef18cd8/1127931381/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.1nd__1043__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

---

Today is International Women’s Day, the day we celebrate the incredible social, economic, and cultural achievements of women.

Despite our progress, women in America do not enjoy the same rights and privileges that men possess. We have an unequal civic infrastructure that uplifts some at the expense of others.

Today, women in America earn $0.79 cents for every dollar earned by men. Women of color earn even less. Our reproductive rights are threatened on a daily basis. We are denied opportunities granted to men and told how to live our lives and what to do with our bodies.

The system is rigged against us. But there is something we can do to change it. If we win Georgia and a Democratic Senate majority, we can ratify the Equal Rights Amendment to make gender discrimination a relic of the past.

**[It is time we stand up and demand equality. Add your name if you agree it is time for rights to be equally guaranteed, regardless of sex.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15861828/167850287/762636607?noskip=true&emci=4a3d373b-6a61-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=2f39c635-7361-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701&contactdata=uqPaAMPZFe4Qi0zMJ7qlYVdndo9TUS9ohvIXL9%2FkD%2FzJStm5OGfugUHo4c3imzz3J66aEkIdbsMRZpqdgCbW4jVTvq%2BKHVdyHKzshFEprWKJ1Mj2VcfEA8Sv8gZySTR8xT1vAzcsv2nKWZQt2JrZA0pPsAm9ZLxVdILkp7d2UDw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM5YzYzNS03MzYxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2kvEGee_FbXux9CShgyWyqlScKLOwH5E6-mDbJQTp4=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15861829/167850288/762636607?noskip=true&emci=4a3d373b-6a61-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=2f39c635-7361-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701&contactdata=uqPaAMPZFe4Qi0zMJ7qlYVdndo9TUS9ohvIXL9%2FkD%2FzJStm5OGfugUHo4c3imzz3J66aEkIdbsMRZpqdgCbW4jVTvq%2BKHVdyHKzshFEprWKJ1Mj2VcfEA8Sv8gZySTR8xT1vAzcsv2nKWZQt2JrZA0pPsAm9ZLxVdILkp7d2UDw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM5YzYzNS03MzYxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2kvEGee_FbXux9CShgyWyqlScKLOwH5E6-mDbJQTp4=) With the newly-Democratic Virginia Legislature’s ratification of the ERA, the U.S. House voted to extend the deadline to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment.

Mitch McConnell refuses to hold a vote in the Senate. That is unacceptable. We are represented by politicians who have failed in their duty to uphold the Constitution. David Perdue simply isn’t there to represent us.

Today, on International Women’s Day, I am calling on the Senate to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment. I am calling on our leaders to uphold their oaths of office and fight for equal rights. **And I am calling on you to raise your voice to demand equality.**

**[We need to speak as one in order to defeat David Perdue, and we need to speak now. Add your name if you agree it is time for us to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15861830/167850289/762636607?noskip=true&emci=4a3d373b-6a61-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=2f39c635-7361-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=463701&contactdata=uqPaAMPZFe4Qi0zMJ7qlYVdndo9TUS9ohvIXL9%2FkD%2FzJStm5OGfugUHo4c3imzz3J66aEkIdbsMRZpqdgCbW4jVTvq%2BKHVdyHKzshFEprWKJ1Mj2VcfEA8Sv8gZySTR8xT1vAzcsv2nKWZQt2JrZA0pPsAm9ZLxVdILkp7d2UDw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjM5YzYzNS03MzYxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2kvEGee_FbXux9CShgyWyqlScKLOwH5E6-mDbJQTp4=)**

Together, we can correct this injustice.

Yours truly,
Teresa ****

name: Gary
subject: re: The DeVos family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
-
| | | |
---
Hey friend, there are few issues more personal to me than education. My dad Herb taught in Michigan schools for 32 years, and through him, I saw directly the impact that strong public education can have. Those are the values that I've carried with me throughout my entire life.

Just the other day, I learned that Betsy DeVos' family is dumping $800,000 in Michigan to defeat me, all because I'm fighting tooth and nail in the Senate for students. **And, to be quite honest, if Betsy DeVos ' family is scared of me, I must be doing something right. **

But their attacks are loud, and they aren't going away. That's why it's so important we fight back for students. So I'm reaching out before my petition closes at midnight. We're really hoping to hear from another 30 folks: **[Will you add your name to fight for an education secretary who stands up for our students? ](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk323-ja-in-nd")**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk323-ja-in-nd")
---
Thank you for standing up for students.

Gary
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: G. Peters
Date: Tues, Feb 11, 2020
Subject: This is an abuse of taxpayer dollars
| | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da8a6/5721a3ed/7f58edb0/efb2bda/1176145766/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friend,

I grew up going to Michigan's public schools. And as the son of a hardworking public school teacher, I know just how important education is. That's why I've been so troubled with Betsy Devos' job as secretary of education.

Since becoming our country's education secretary, Betsy DeVos has done nothing but cater to wealthy interests, putting greedy corporations above our students and teachers.
**She 's even drained over half a BILLION dollars of taxpayer money into sham charter schools that closed or never opened - many of which were right here in Michigan.**
DeVos is abusing our taxpayer money, and we urgently need to hold her accountable. That's why I need another 871 supporters like you to stand with me against Betsy DeVos' misconduct - **so join me in calling for an education secretary who actually puts our students first. **
**[Friend, if you care about the quality of our students' education, add your name now to denounce Betsy DeVos and demand a better education secretary for our students.](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk323-ja-in-nd")**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/DeVosResignation?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FGP-DeVos-Resignation%3Fcode%3Djtk323-ja-in-nd")
---
Michigan's students need a leader who will advocate for their success - and Betsy DeVos is robbing them of their chances at a world-class education. Thank you so much, friend, for standing with me for what's right.
Gary

name: Christy Smith
subject: On International Women's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Today is International Women's Day, and this month is Women's History Month. These mean so much to me as a woman and mother of two daughters: Every day, I want them to feel recognized for their strength and value in society, to be safe from discrimination in school and in the workplace, and to be treated (and paid) equally to men.

That's a big reason why I'm running for Congress. In 2018, we saw a wave of Democratic women elected to the House of Representatives, and together they've passed more than 400 bills ranging from the Keeping Girls in School Act to expanding health care coverage.

**I'm hoping to be one of the next women in Congress because I'm ready to make sure we're fighting for each and every woman -- including my daughters.**

**[So on International Women's Day, chip in to my race for Congress to elect another woman who will go to Washington and get to work.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b834/29776869/afdca56/569f9169/3815202365/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDhfd29tZW5zZGF5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200308_womensday-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b834/29776869/afdca56/569f916a/3815202365/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDhfd29tZW5zZGF5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200308_womensday-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b834/29776869/afdca56/569f916b/3815202365/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDhfd29tZW5zZGF5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200308_womensday-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b834/29776869/afdca56/569f9166/3815202365/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDhfd29tZW5zZGF5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200308_womensday-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b834/29776869/afdca56/569f9169/3815202365/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDhfd29tZW5zZGF5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200308_womensday-full")
In the State Capitol, I helped secure funding for child care and health care facilities in our district. I've stood up for equal pay for equal work and access to the same affordable health care as everyone else.

When I'm in Congress, I'm going to work tirelessly to make sure women have the tools and protections to thrive -- because when women succeed, we all succeed.

**[I will work hard for our community and our families in Congress -- help me get there by pitching in $5 or whatever you can today.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b834/29776869/afdca56/569f9169/3815202365/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMDhfd29tZW5zZGF5LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200308_womensday-full")**

I promise to carry on these fights when I'm in Congress, for my girls and for you.

Thanks,

Christy

body:
All eyes are on Texas this election

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18cca/366381916/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

Hi Peter,

**All eyes are on Texas this election.** That's clear after turnout increased by over 700,000 in Tuesday's primary. **[Will you rush a donation today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18cc9/366381916/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.2nd__1031__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Here's the deal: _The Dallas Morning News_ wrote that "the most-watched race in Texas will be the Senate battle," and we're gearing up for a hard fight in November. We know that Senator Cornyn is already pouring money into this race -- and he has a nearly $12 million war chest heavily funded by special interest donors.

**Donate now to win this Senate seat and elect MJ to fight for us in a Senate that works for all Texans.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18cc8/366381916/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200308.2nd__1031__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18ccf/366381916/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200308.2nd__1031__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18cce/366381916/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200308.2nd__1031__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18ccd/366381916/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200308.2nd__1031__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18ccc/366381916/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.2nd__1031__")**
Texas needs a senator who fights to make any real progress. **And the path to a Senate that prioritizes the people over special interests and corporate PACs runs straight through Texas.**

MJ's not taking money from corporate PACs, because she answers to Texans, not the special interests. So if you believe in a new kind of Senate -- one that serves the people, not the special interests -- we absolutely have to get MJ elected. And that starts with the support of folks like you.

**[Pitch in $10 to elect MJ and build a Senate that serves the people, not the special interests.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890293/7f51f7bc/4c5d6606/4ef18cc9/366381916/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.2nd__1031__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,

Team MJ

name: Dave Chase, Team Merkley
subject: I'm excited about my new job.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2eeea/6cd27893/53a6dae2/15901c57/506031147/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | **I'm Dave Chase, Jeff Merkley's new campaign manager.** I am excited to get to work with Jeff because we have a _lot_ to do. We'll be opening offices across the state, hiring field organizers to mobilize our movement, and doing everything it will take to _win_ in November. But first: the official candidate filing deadline is on Tuesday at 5 p.m. That's when we'll know what the field looks like--who the Republicans are that think they can beat our man, Jeff. | Folks, Just yesterday, I wrote to you about the decades-long struggle for voting rights in America and the work we have yet to do. Then I saw this headline: **" Texas closes hundreds of polling sites, making it harder for minorities to vote"** --_The Guardian_ (March 2, 2020) Last year, my home state of Texas led the country in polling place closures, especially in black and latino communities. 750 polling places across the state have shut down since 2012. **Folks, this is no accident.** Republicans are employing some of the same time-tested tactics that were used to silence black voters in the civil rights era. By making voting difficult and time-consuming, they aim to discourage folks -- especially those who are short on time off work and financial resources -- from making their voices heard. [**It 's going to take a lot of resources to fight back against Texas Republicans' wicked and anti-democratic agenda -- can you rush a contribution now to help keep up the fight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WldBKNAs1VgjFzoqXFuVLDo703tKKAfG6M0tYa1sIxs=/_dRZhbCIDUENi-KKbhQqx2jLxgQUqzFTRrYb-9dcup0=?refcode=E1677-20200308-PollClosures-SL&amount=25) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$25](https://act.myngp.com/el/WldBKNAs1VgjFzoqXFuVLDo703tKKAfG6M0tYa1sIxs=/_dRZhbCIDUENi-KKbhQqx2jLxgQUqzFTRrYb-9dcup0=?express_lane=true&refcode=E1677-20200308-PollClosures-EG&amount=25)**

Hello

Momentum is building, debates are being set, and I hear from Iowans everyday that it's time we made Washington fix problems like we do in small town Iowa.

When we get together as neighbors, we get the job done.

But it's going to take you, your sister, your neighbor, and everyone you know to win this election, keep our seat
RED, and take back Congress. In our race, you can make that difference.

Let me know how you plan to help out
⬇️ (https://emojipedia.org/down-arrow/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489)
PUT UP A BARN SIGN (https://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489)

HOST A GET TOGETHER (https://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489)
Contribute $10 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the coming months.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. 85 DAYS until the primary on June 2nd. We NEED your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489) today!
BUILDING OUR NETWORK

Great week on the campaign trail meeting and listening to Iowans in every corner of the district. Glad to be with the Hardin County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/HardinCountyRepublicans/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489) in Iowa Falls to talk about securing the border from illegal drug entry. It was pleasure to be with the Western Iowa Young Republicans (https://www.facebook.com/WesternIowaYoungRepublicans/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489) in Carroll to hear from young conservative professionals about the tolerance for being a conservative in their generation. And many thanks to the entire Dirks family for putting together a great meeting in Rock Rapids.

Spent today and yesterday with my team knocking doors. Let me know here (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489) if you'd like to help us get the word out!

RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-talks-supporting-gun-rights-cutting-spending-and-lowering-drug-prices-with-khoi/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489

"I think I can get something done in 10 years to represent our district, make our country a little bit better, and allow the next person to go and do the same thing. That's what Iowans want too. We don't want to have this ruling class.”
UP NEXT

Looking forward to speaking with the Chickasaw County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/ChickasawCountyRepublicans/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489) in New Hampton and the Webster County GOP (https://www.facebook.com/webstercountygop/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489) in Fort Dodge. Also excited to hear from grassroots conservatives across the district at this Saturday's upcoming county conventions where our party's platform will be created.

STAY INFORMED

* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489)

* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=16b6e2ad58-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-16b6e2ad58-25822489)

name: Booker HQ
subject: Cory's been hard at work in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| Here's an update on what he's working on: Team, these last few weeks have been very busy for Cory to say the least. Here's a quick update on what Cory's been working on in the Senate lately:
* **Securing funding to combat coronavirus.** Cory successfully helped direct federal funding to state and local health departments that are on the frontlines of this public health crisis. A spending package with the funding Cory requested passed the Senate earlier this week.

* **Standing up for part-time workers.** Cory partnered with some of his colleagues in the Senate to introduce the Part-Time Workers Bill of Rights to empower Americans who work part-time. This would allow more part-time employees to participate in their employers' pension plans and become eligible for family and medical leave.

* **Fighting to improve air quality for our children.** Cory recently introduced legislation to improve air quality in schools. His bill calls for providing grants to schools for air filters that will allow students to learn in an environment free of harmful air pollution, an issue that disproportionately impacts schools in communities of color.

* **Supporting healthy nutrition in schools.** Cory worked across the aisle to introduce a bipartisan bill that would fund nutrition education in schools. This legislation would help expand access to education opportunities that teach students about healthy diet choices.

These are only a few of the important issues Cory's been focused on this past month. As he continues to be a champion for working families, it's so critical that we hear directly from you. **[What are some of your priorities that you'd like to see addressed in the Senate? Take this survey to share your thoughts directly with Cory.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/senate-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20200308_BHQ_20200308-su-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We look forward to reading your response. Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/senate-priorities-survey?source=em_su_20200308_BHQ_20200308-su-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fab/5fca0d19/7a50f368/291d02de/1691157183/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fab/5fca0d19/7a50f368/291d02dd/1691157183/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fab/5fca0d19/7a50f368/291d02dc/1691157183/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").

name: James Mackler
subject: This is backwards →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Something needs to change.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1af/18d6a294/4ccfdc2d/26d618c9/1170073952/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | You've probably heard me say this before -- I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs. That's not just a talking point. It's a driving force behind our campaign. **And here 's why: Washington is broken.** As outside groups and corporations pour more money into our elections, our leaders increasingly make decisions based on the interests of their wealthiest donors instead of doing what's right for their constituents. **It 's backwards.** [_**PUT AN END TO DARK MONEY IN POLITICS ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1af/18d6a294/4ccfdc2d/26d61836/1170073952/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200308p_a") I want to get back to basics and make Washington work for Tennessee again, and thankfully, I'm not alone. Sunday, March 8th, marks one year since the House passed the For the People Act, which would: \- Require super PACs and special-interest groups to **disclose donors.**
\- Strengthen regulations on **political ads on social media.**
\- Increase oversight for **campaign finance violations.**
\- Fully restore the **Voting Rights Act.** **Here 's the bad news: Mitch McConnell has sent this important bill to his legislative graveyard along with hundreds of others.** [_**We need 20,000 citizen co-sponsors to add their names before the one-year anniversary of the For the People Act and put pressure on McConnell to take action on this important piece of legislation.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1af/18d6a294/4ccfdc2d/26d61836/1170073952/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200308p_a") [_**ADD YOUR NAME ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1af/18d6a294/4ccfdc2d/26d61836/1170073952/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200308p_a") In service, James
---

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---

| | The filibuster became famous during the Civil Rights era as a tool for segregationists to block meaningful civil rights laws. Today, the GOP is using those same tactics to undermine the fight for social and economic justice, and progressive reforms that the majority of Americans want. **That's why we need to end the filibuster in the Senate.** Ending the filibuster would re-empower the will of the American people - and allow us to pass the ambitious, progressive policies that the majority of Americans want. We could overhaul our broken health care system, combat the climate crisis, fix our shattered economy that prevents too many from getting ahead, deliver on immigration reform, and pass the mental health legislation that our families desperately need. It's abundantly clear our Senate no longer serves the priorities of the American people. Our country has changed, our politics have changed, so now our institutions must change with it. In order to do so, we need to fix the chokeholds in our current system - _we need to end the filibuster._ [**I will fight Mitch McConnell in the Senate to end the filibuster. But first, we need to win this election. Will you pitch in $3 to ensure we have the resources we need to win?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639007a/55b66746/237f077f/80e3d09/3545052141/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-03-08-filibuster&recurring=1&amount=3") We won't get progressive change with the status quo. | | Hey Peter,

After our incredible week, I wanted to reach out to tell you how grateful I am for all your support so far. Every dollar from this team has been a crucial part of our strategy and prepares us to kick ass in this next phase of this campaign.

As we enter the next part of this campaign I have to see if you're with me. **[If you've been waiting for the right time to make your donation -- it's right now.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890297/7f51f7bc/4c5fc65b/4ef18d0c/4177837729/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.3nd__1029__&amount=10&recurring=true")** I'll be blunt, it takes a lot of money to travel all over Texas and spread our message through ads. There are still a lot of undecided voters, and we're running out of time to reach them.

**[So I'm asking you to pitch in whatever you can.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890297/7f51f7bc/4c5fc65b/4ef18d0c/4177837729/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwMjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200308.3nd__1029__&amount=10&recurring=true")** We need to talk to every voter we can and make sure they know who I am and how I'm going to fight for them in the Senate. **Will you make a donation right now to help?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
